info.title: ABP v2 - Automated Bet Placing API
info.description:
Place bets across 30+ bookmakers through a single API.

## Authentication

All endpoints require the `X-ABP-API-KEY` header.

**Swagger UI**: Click the **Authorize** button (lock icon) at the top right, enter your API key, and click **Authorize**.

## Quick Start

1. **List your accounts**: `GET /accounts`
2. **Get live odds**: `GET /betslip?fixtureId=...&outcomeId=...&playerId=0`
3. **Place an order**: `POST /place-orders`
4. **Track results**: `GET /orders` or subscribe to WebSocket updates

## WebSocket

Connect to `/ws` for real-time order, bet, and settlement updates.

```json
{"type": "login", "apiKey": "your-api-key", "channels": []}
```

Send an empty `channels` array to receive all updates. Available channels: `orders`, `bets`, `settlements`, `accounts`, `balance`, `fixtures`, `currencies`, `status`, `emergency`.

Send `{"type": "ping"}` every 30 seconds to keep the connection alive.

get.description:
Get all accounts for the authenticated client.

Optionally filter by bookmaker. Returns accounts ordered by priority (highest first).

200.description: List of accounts for the authenticated client

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description:
Create a new bookmaker account for the authenticated client.

Each client can have multiple accounts per bookmaker. Use priority
to control which account is selected first.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description:
Get a specific account by its primary key (bookmaker, username).

Only returns account if it belongs to the authenticated client.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

403.description: Access denied - account belongs to different client

patch.description:
Update an existing account.

Only the account owner (client) can update their accounts.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

403.description: Access denied - account belongs to different client

delete.description:
Delete an account.

Only the account owner (client) can delete their accounts.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

403.description: Access denied - account belongs to different client

get.description:
Retrieve aggregated open (unsettled) positions grouped by bookmaker, account, or userRef.

Returns the number of open bets, total stake, and average price for each group.
Only includes bets with `betStatus` in (PLACED, CONFIRMED) and `settlementStatus` = UNSETTLED.

**Group by options:**
- `bookmaker` (default) - Group by bookmaker
- `account` - Group by bookmaker account
- `userRef` - Group by user reference

**Filters:**
- `bookmaker` - Filter to a specific bookmaker
- `userRef` - Filter to a specific user reference
- `account` - Filter to a specific account

parameters.name: groupBy

schema.description: Group positions by: bookmaker, account, or userRef
schema.title: Groupby

parameters.description: Group positions by: bookmaker, account, or userRef

get.description:
Calculates realized and unrealized PnL.

Only includes settled bets (`settlementStatus` NOT in UNSETTLED).

**Group by options:**
- `bookmaker` (default) - Group by bookmaker
- `account` - Group by bookmaker account
- `userRef` - Group by user reference

**Filters:**
- `bookmaker` - Filter to a specific bookmaker
- `userRef` - Filter to a specific user reference
- `account` - Filter to a specific account

parameters.name: groupBy

schema.description: Group PnL by: bookmaker, account, or userRef
schema.title: Groupby

parameters.description: Group PnL by: bookmaker, account, or userRef

get.description:
Retrieve bets by various filters with keyset pagination. At least one filter must be provided.

**Filters (OR logic):**
- `betIds` - Comma-separated list of bet IDs
- `orderIds` - Comma-separated list of order IDs
- `userRef` - User reference string

**Pagination:**
- Results are ordered by betId descending (newest first)
- Use `afterBetId` from `nextCursor` in the response to fetch the next page
- `hasMore` indicates if more results are available

All matching bets are returned (union of all filter matches).
Results are filtered to only include bets belonging to the authenticated client.

**Bet Status Values:**
- `PENDING` - Bet submitted, awaiting confirmation
- `CONFIRMED` - Bet accepted by bookmaker
- `DECLINED` - Bet rejected by bookmaker
- `CANCELLED` - Bet cancelled before confirmation

**Settlement Status Values:**
- `UNSETTLED` - Event not yet settled
- `WON` - Bet won
- `LOST` - Bet lost
- `VOID` - Bet voided/cancelled
- `PUSHED` - Stake returned (tie)

parameters.name: afterBetId

schema.description: Cursor for pagination: fetch bets with betId less than this value
schema.title: Afterbetid

parameters.description: Cursor for pagination: fetch bets with betId less than this value

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of bets to return per page
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of bets to return per page

post.description:
Cancel orders by one or more filters.

- `orderIds`: numeric IDs
- `requestUuids`: UUID strings from when the order was placed
- `userRef`: your custom reference string

Only orders in a pending state are cancelled ("pending" or "partial-placed").
Any associated pending bets are marked cancelled.

200.description: Cancellation result with enriched order details

schema.title: Response Cancel Orders Cancel Orders Post

post.description:
Validates and places orders through the configured bookmakers.

Each order may specify a comma-separated `bookmakers` string or rely on
auto-selection (missing/empty/"*").

200.description: Order placement results with accepted and declined orders

schema.title: Response Place Orders Place Orders Post

400.description: Validation error or all orders declined

declinedOrders.declineReason: Order stake 100.00 USD exceeds available limit 50.00 USD

post.description:
Cancel ALL pending and partial-placed orders for the authenticated client.
Only cancels orders without placed bets.

200.description: Cancellation result with enriched order details

schema.title: Response Cancel All Orders Cancel All Orders Post

CancelOrdersRequest.title: CancelOrdersRequest
CancelOrdersRequest.description:
Request body for the POST /cancel-orders endpoint.

Cancel one or more pending orders. At least one filter must be provided.
Multiple filters are combined with OR logic.

## Behavior
- Only orders in "pending" or "partial-placed" status can be cancelled
- Orders with placed bets may not be fully cancellable (bookmaker-dependent)
- Cancelled orders are marked in the database and signaled to stop retry loops

## Response
Returns cancelled orders and any that couldn't be cancelled with reasons.

requestUuid.title: Requestuuid
requestUuid.description: Unique idempotency key for this order. Duplicate UUIDs within 5 minutes are rejected.

outcomeId.title: Outcomeid
outcomeId.description: Outcome/market ID from OddsPAPI (e.g., 103 for Match Winner Home)

playerId.title: Playerid
playerId.description: Player ID for player prop markets. Use 0 for non-player markets.

orderPrice.title: Orderprice
orderPrice.description: Minimum acceptable decimal odds. Bets will only be placed at this price or better.

orderStake.title: Orderstake
orderStake.description: Stake amount in orderCurrency. Must be within bookmaker min/max limits.

userRef.title: Userref
userRef.description: Your reference string for grouping/filtering orders (e.g., user ID, session ID)

testOrder.title: Testorder
testOrder.description: If true, order is validated and persisted but NOT placed with bookmaker. Use for testing.

bookmakers.title: Bookmakers
bookmakers.description: Comma-separated bookmaker slugs to target (e.g., 'pinnacle,bet365'). Use '*' or omit for automatic selection among all allowed bookmakers.

orderCurrency.title: Ordercurrency
orderCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for orderStake. Converted to bookmaker currency at placement.

back.title: Back
back.description: Bet direction. True = back bet (win if selection wins). False = lay bet (win if selection loses).

expiresAt.title: Expiresat
expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when order expires. Defaults to 5 seconds from now if not provided. Order stops trying to place after this time.

acceptBetterOdds.title: Acceptbetterodds
acceptBetterOdds.description: Accept odds better than orderPrice. If false, only exact price or worse is accepted.

acceptPartialStake.title: Acceptpartialstake
acceptPartialStake.description: Allow partial stake fills when full stake exceeds bookmaker limit.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Custom metadata object. Stored with order but not sent to bookmaker.

PlaceOrderRequest.title: PlaceOrderRequest
PlaceOrderRequest.description:
Single order payload for the place-orders endpoint.

This model represents the shape of an incoming order before
server-side enrichment and bookmaker selection.

## Required Fields
- `requestUuid`: Idempotency key - prevents duplicate order placement
- `fixtureId`: OddsPAPI fixture ID (e.g., "id1000004461512432")
- `outcomeId`: Market outcome ID (e.g., 103 for Match Winner Home)
- `playerId`: Player ID for player props (use 0 for non-player markets)
- `orderPrice`: Minimum acceptable decimal odds (e.g., 1.95)
- `orderStake`: Stake amount in orderCurrency
- `userRef`: Your reference for grouping/tracking orders
- `testOrder`: If true, order is validated but not placed with bookmaker

## Optional Fields
- `bookmakers`: Target specific bookmakers (comma-separated or "*" for all)
- `orderCurrency`: Currency code (default: "USD")
- `back`: True for back bets, false for lay bets (default: true)
- `expiresAt`: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp (default: 5 seconds from now)
- `acceptBetterOdds`: Accept odds better than orderPrice (default: true)
- `acceptPartialStake`: Allow partial fills (default: true)
- `meta`: Custom metadata object

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: List of orders to place. Each order is processed independently. Maximum 100 orders per request.

PlaceOrdersRequest.title: PlaceOrdersRequest
PlaceOrdersRequest.description:
Request body for the POST /place-orders endpoint.

Submit one or more betting orders for placement with bookmakers.
Each order is independently validated and placed.

## Response
Returns a JSON object with:
- `status`: "success" | "partial-success" | "declined"
- `acceptedOrders`: List of successfully placed/pending orders with bets
- `declinedOrders`: List of orders that failed validation with reasons

## Idempotency
Each order's `requestUuid` is used as an idempotency key. Duplicate
UUIDs within 5 minutes are rejected to prevent double-placement.

apiKey.name: X-ABP-API-KEY
apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Contact admin to obtain a key.
